seoTitle: Brentwood vs Breton Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Brentwood and Breton Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Brentwood vs Breton Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Brentwood and Breton Bay.
heading: Brentwood vs Breton Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brentwood, Western Australia and Breton Bay, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Breton Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Brentwood (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brentwood or Breton Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brentwood has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Breton Bay scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brentwood scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Breton Bay scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brentwood or Breton Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Breton Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
